name: Plague of Cyprian
sources_notes: Cyprian of Carthage; possibly Ebola or smallpox

name: Plague of Justinian (first wave)
sources_notes: Procopius; Yersinia pestis, multiple waves to ~750

name: Black Death
sources_notes: Boccaccio; Yersinia pestis; 30-60% of European pop

name: Cocoliztli epidemic
sources_notes: Acuna-Soto et al.; possibly indigenous viral hemorrhagic fever

name: Russian plague
sources_notes: Catherine II era; concentrated in Moscow

name: Third plague pandemic
sources_notes: Started Yunnan; included 1894 Hong Kong outbreak

name: Fifth cholera pandemic
sources_notes: Last major cholera pandemic before sanitation

name: Spanish flu (H1N1)
sources_notes: World War I context; deadliest pandemic of 20th C

name: Seventh cholera pandemic
sources_notes: Vibrio cholerae El Tor biotype; still ongoing technically
